eq_dg: Tezi ndide za mwiri zinazosaidia kupigana na makongo.

eq: thickly woven basket used to hold water
eq_sw: aina ya kikapu kizito kinachotumiwa kuwekea maji
eq_dg: Chikapu chizito chirichofumwa kpwa ukali ili chiweze kushikira madzi.
Angaliya ngarawa.
Baraza ya azehe anaohukumu mambo ga mudzi.
Angaliya ngekewa.

eq: traditional dance performed using dried pods of the mbambakofi
eq_dg: Ngoma ya chienyeji inayochezwa kpwa kuhumira makufu makavu ya mbambakofi.
Hadithi, fumbo au ndarira inayosimuriwa.
Chombo cha kudzirinda nacho wakati wa viha.

eq: how many? ngapi? Agreement: Atu angaphi? Mizigo mingaphi? Maembe mangaphi? Vyala vingaphi? Nazi ngaphi?
eq_dg: Neno ra kuuza chiasi; ni angaphi?
Chombo cha kuvukira bahari chirichochongwa kula muhi na kukala na papi za uphande.
Hali ya kulala au kuangaliya uso dzulu.

eq: kuhenda/kufanya to administer or apply first aid to a person prior
eq_dg: Msada wa kpwandza unaohewa mutu kabla ya kuphiya hospitalini.

eq: red-brown striped or spotted lizard with a red tail which moves very quickly. The withered tails of this lizard are commonly found on footpaths
eq_sw: it is believed that if the tail is buried along with a type of red ant (mwalikuni or pambo) this will cause people to fight in that place; aina ya mjusi mdogo anayetembea kwa kasi kuliko aina nyingine
eq_dg: Aina ya mjusi mdide wa rangi ya kundu-kahawia wenye mkia wa kundu, anayeenyendeka kpwa kasi sana.
Chombo cha kupandzira au kushereyera kutsi kpwa kuikira magulu kahi ya fito.

eq: piece of ground which has been cleared for cultivation
eq_dg: Phatu phenye kutsahwa ili pharimwe.

eq: base of the tail (used of birds)
eq_dg: Seemu ya mwandzo wa mkia, hasa ya nyuni.
Jiwe ridide na ngumu sana.

eq: small mammal. Tradition states that when this animal dies all the other forest creatures come to the body to pay their respects
eq_sw: consequently traditional healers use the skin of this animal as a charm
eq_dg: Aina ya chinyama kidide cha tsakani ambacho chinapholaga vinyama vyosi vya tsakani vinakpwedza kuchiomboleya.

eq: ngondo kienyeji hutumia ngozi y ya mnyama huyu kwa kuvutia wateja na wapenzi
eq_dg: Chinyama kidide cha tsakani ambacho ngozi yake inahumirwa ni aganga kuvutira atu.
Aina ya chombo cha muziki chenye nyuzi.
Wakati wa shida kabla ya mavuno ambapo chakurya ni chache.

eq: tightly (e.g. a knot that has been tied)
eq_dg: Kpwa kukaza sana, hasa kamba au chifungo.
Kpwa kukaza sana, zaidi ya ngi.
Mstari wa mwisho wa nyere chitwani.
Ukongo ambapo seemu ya ndani ya mwiri inatuluka kupitira tundu.
Hali ya atu ario phamwenga wakati wosi, kusotengana.
Kufunga kamba kpwa kukaza sana.
Kutunda matunda kula muhini.

eq: matso to close eyes and look away in scorn
eq_dg: Kufunga matso na kuangaliya uphande wanjine kpwa dharau.

eq: type of small fish with a spiny back
eq_dg: Aina ya samaki mdide wa mwibani wenye miiba mgongoni.

eq: place where two branches of a tree rub together
eq_sw: sehemu ambayo matawi ya mti hukwaruzana
eq_dg: Phatu ambapo matawe mairi ga muhi ganagusana na kuswagana.
Korodani; seemu ya mwiri ya chilume ya kuzaira.

eq: wind instrument made from the horn of a cow or a goat
eq_dg: Chombo cha muziki cha kupigirwa kpwa kupuhirwa, chirichohendwa kpwa pembe ya ng'ombe au mbuzi.
Ngoma ya kucheza ambapo atu anapigwa ni pepo, kuno ngoma zinahumirwa badala ya kayamba.

eq: ledge high on a cliff face
eq_dg: Phatu phenye mwamba dzulu phanaphotsamika, au nyumba ngumu ya kale.
Kidudu kidide chinaingira ngozini mwa vidole vya magulu na kutaga mayo.
Kuzimia, kupoteza achili kpwa muda mfupi.
Kupumua kpwa nguvu, kutulusa pumuzi kpwa nguvu.
Tunda ra mukorosho, renye ngozi ngumu na njere ndani.
Kuhenda sauti kpwa pula wakati wa kulala.
Kukala na phepho, kusikira hali ya nyuzinyuzi.
Phatu pha kukunjika kpwa chala cha mkpwono.
Mutu anayepatanisha pande mbiri au kurehera ujumbe kahi ya atu.
Mutu anayeimba vinono, malenga.
Chinyama cha tsakani chinaofanana na mutu, mkpwulu na chenye nguvu.
Aina ya samaki mkpwulu wa bahari wenye harufu kali.
Hali ya kudziona bora kuriko atu anjine, kiburi.

eq: type of plant: parasite in tree tops with bright red berries and
eq_dg: Aina ya muhi wa kuererera dzulu ya mihi yanjine wenye matunda ga kundu maridze.
Nguruwe wa tsakani, chinyama cha kuishi porini.
Sifa, utukufu, kujulikana na atu anji.

eq: person with one leg shorter than the other
eq_dg: Mutu ambaye gulu mwenga ri fupi kuriko ranjine.
Kuhenda sauti kulu sana dza ya simba au ya radi.
Sauti kulu sana, dza ya radi au mnyama mkpwulu.
Kumiza chitu kpwa haraka bila kutafuna vinono.
Rangi isiyo kali, ya kufifia.
Uwezo wa kuhenda kazi ngumu, mkpwotse wa mwiri.
Chitu cha kuvwalwa mwirini, nguo.

eq: pillar, center pole, strut (main roof support)
eq_dg: Muhi mkpwulu wa kushikira nyumba, hasa wa kahi-kahi wa dari.
